title: rubus rosellus
intro: Rubus rosellus, also known as the red raspberry leaf, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). The plant has been used for centuries in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include being a natural astringent, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial agent. The health benefits of consuming Rubus rosellus are numerous, including reducing menstrual cramps, promoting healthy digestion, and providing essential minerals like iron and calcium. Rubus rosellus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used by pregnant women to prepare for childbirth and promote a smooth labor experience.
